_meta.description: Cells whose figure is genuinely published in an insurer/exchange/regulator filing but is NOT obtainable through the automated pipeline (source blocks automated download, or the document isn't machine-extractable). Rendered as an honest 'awaiting source file' state (grey) with the per-cell reason — never a fake value, never a red 'missing'. Each fills automatically the moment a real value lands for that cell. Curated 2026-06-12.

cells.niva-bupa::nwp::Q4FY25: Net written premium for Niva Bupa Q4FY25 is published in Niva Bupa's IRDAI NL public-disclosure filing / annual report, but isn't obtainable via the automated pipeline (source blocks automated download or isn't machine-extractable). Fills when the filing is dropped into the project.
